channel.title: Comments for page "Undead, Insane and Fully Loaded"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Undead, Insane and Fully Loaded"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Late to the party, but Gunmetal Gary is a joy to behold here. Went back and updooted his original SCP file based on this cameo. Truly, he is by far the most all-American anomalous zombie one could wish for.

And I cannot stop thinking about the fact that his gun, whose bullets only hit "bad guys", multiply punctured Eugene. (Who's okay because he's a Clown.) Is he plotting something?! Who knows. Is this just a random humorous detail that works because Eugene is just generally not a great guy that I'm massively overanalyzing? Very likely.

Nonetheless. Much happiness. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Next time on the Gregarious Adventures of Gunmetal Gary!

What happens when you give Gunmetal Gary a gun powered by a god bound by the souls of murdered children?! A special crossover episode! Get ready for… Gunmetal Gary and SCP-Numbah One!!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Not every day that Lolly is the reserved and responsible party in a conversation.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Nobody tells me to do anything. Because I don't know if you know this, but I'm super ugly. Look at this face. Not the face of a guy you tell stuff to

I'm going to incorporate Gunmetal Gary quotes into my life.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I can do a show, a big pyrotechnic show with explosions in all the colours of the rainbow! It will be like if a Michael Bay movie had sex with a bag of skittles.

Gunmetal Gary is already one of my all time favorite characters.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Well, I pretty much told you why I love this in chat, so here I'll just say +1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
YES!

CadaverCommander's awesome weapons distributing zombie meets the Circus! Shame they got off on the wrong foot, I bet his show would be amazing.

Now I can only hope that Joey Fucknuts can make it there too. I bet Lolly would love him.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Not much to say here, enjoyable read overall.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: a worthy representation of the character and a very fun article all the way 'round. this is solid work and you've earned my vote.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Big thanks to CadaverCommander for not only creating the character of Gunmetal Gary but for making sure I got the character right. He actually wrote the first few paragraphs of Gary's to give me something to work with. Check out his stuff if you haven't already, especially SCP-3884.
